source.authors: Adam White, Jan Christoph Bernack, Rick Harker
source.description: An arbitrary precision decimal (base 10) floating point number type using a mantissa and exponent. Supports nth roots, trigonometric functions, logarithms, natural e, pi, etc.
source.tags: math mathematics arbitrary-precision floating-point decimal arithmetic trigonometry logarithms numerics numbers biginteger bigdecimal hyperbolic inverse trigonometric sine cosine tangent secant circular angles sin cos tan mantissa exponent floating point base10 csharp
